ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft model */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft (e.g., Boeing, Airbus) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "cabin_classes" TEXT /* JSON array of cabin classes (e.g., Economy, Business, First Class) */,
  "introduction_date" TEXT /* Date the aircraft was introduced into service */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date the aircraft is expected to be retired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seatmaps" (
  "seatmap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seatmap */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft the seatmap belongs to */,
  "seatmap_name" TEXT /* Name of the seatmap */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats in the seatmap */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Cabin class of the seatmap (e.g., Economy, Business, First Class) */,
  "introduction_date" TEXT /* Date the seatmap was introduced */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the seatmap was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seatmap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seatmaps_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seats" (
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat */,
  "seatmap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seatmap the seat belongs to */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number */,
  "seat_type" TEXT /* Type of seat (e.g., Recliner) */,
  "seat_pitch" INTEGER /* Seat pitch */,
  "seat_width" INTEGER /* Seat width */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video available */,
  "laptop_power" TEXT /* Availability of laptop power */,
  "power_type" TEXT /* Type of power available */,
  "wi_fi" INTEGER /* Availability of Wi-Fi */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Cabin class of the seat */,
  "is_aisle_seat" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the seat is an aisle seat */,
  "is_window_seat" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the seat is a window seat */,
  "is_middle_seat" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the seat is a middle seat */,
  "is_exit_row" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the seat is in an exit row */,
  "is_bulkhead" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the seat is a bulkhead seat */,
  "is_recliner" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the seat is a recliner */,
  "additional_services" TEXT /* JSON array of additional services (e.g., extra legroom, priority boarding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seats_seatmap_id FOREIGN KEY ("seatmap_id") REFERENCES seatmaps ("seatmap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer program number */,
  "preferred_cabin_class" TEXT /* Preferred cabin class for bookings */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who made the booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seat booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., Confirmed, Cancelled) */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the booking */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Cabin class of the booked seat */,
  "number_of_passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the booking */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_seat_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_id") REFERENCES seats ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft operating the flight */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* Departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* Arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique flight number */,
  "airline" TEXT /* Name of the airline operating the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the flight in miles */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number for departure */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal for departure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_seats" (
  "flight_seat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight seat */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seat */,
  "seat_status" TEXT /* Status of the seat (e.g., Available, Booked) */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Cabin class of the seat */,
  "is_assigned" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the seat is assigned to a passenger */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger assigned to the seat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_seats_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_seats_seat_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_id") REFERENCES seats ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_seats_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_details" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_details_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who gave the review */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Cabin class of the flight reviewed */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the passenger */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the service provided */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the seat comfort */,
  "amenities_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the in-flight amenities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
